pageContext.name: G Structure (GS04) Archangel Bridge
pageContext.description: Upgrade your gunpla display and collection! Mobile Suit Gundam SEED joins the Realistic Model series and brings the G Structure (GS04) Archangel Bridge!  The GS04 Archangel Bridge is based on episode 35 where the Freedom Gundam makes its first appearance to defend the Archangel. The details and paintwork all capture the intricate details in HG scale to allow and display to stand out! A special stand for Gundam models is also included which can be extended with attachment parts for different scenes. Perfectly scaled to create dynamic scenes for 1:144 scale Gundam figures and model kits.  Decals are also included for even more details! Be sure to display it together with the separately sold Archangel Catapult Deck for an even more impressive display! Great for play and display - upgrade your Gundam collection with the Realistic Model Series.
